recordTitle: Code-path decision: tag filtering and URL-state structure
summary: Path A (functional core, thin shell) was selected and explicitly accepted in chat. Paths B and C remain recorded as rejected alternatives with their own change conditions. No production code has been modified.
acceptedVia: explicit chat confirmation after candidate export

canonicalBody: DecisionGate D-01 resolved: Path A — functional core, thin imperative shell. Paths B (custom element) and C (pub/sub store) preserved as rejected alternatives with change conditions. See the comparison matrix in the instrument evidence; interface control decisions remain with interface-directions.
